new_classes.label_en: PDO Still Wine in Containers of 2 Litres or Less – CN 22042226
new_classes.label_de: Stillwein mit g.U. in Behältnissen bis 2 Liter – KN 22042226
new_classes.definition_en: Still wine of fresh grapes with a Protected Designation of Origin (PDO), presented in containers of 2 litres or less, classified under CN subheading 22042226 (within the range 22042222–22042278, Wein mit geschützter Ursprungsbezeichnung, per Additional Note 6(a) to Chapter 22).

coverage_explanation: The legal note identifies CN 22042226 as a PDO still wine in small containers (≤2 L), falling within the range 22042222–22042278, governed by Additional Note 6(a) to Chapter 22. The axioms capture: (1) membership in PDOStillWineSmallContainer, (2) the PDO origin quality via someValuesFrom ProtectedDesignationOfOrigin, (3) the container volume constraint (≤2 L), and (4) the exact CN code string. Coverage is partial because Additional Note 6(a) likely specifies further sub-criteria (e.g. actual alcoholic strength ranges or specific wine style attributes) distinguishing 22042226 from its siblings 22042222, 22042224, 22042228, etc. within the 22042222–22042278 range; those intra-range discriminators are not captured here as the full text of Additional Note 6(a) was not provided.
